creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 160494
Patch to the ports tree

Update devel/visualparadigm to 12.2 build 20150820.

Two major changes:
 - Use of sqlitejdbc
 - Use of Oracle's jdk. It no longer works with OpenJDK and the upstream project indicated that they won't make changes to make it work with it either.

Attached poudriere logs for {10.2, 9.3}amd64
